## Final Truth

The Evolution Layer is a controlled self-improvement layer.
It observes system signals, scores readiness, recommends next improvements, and requires operator approval.
It does not silently rewrite code, fake BLE proof, bypass Android protections, or claim APK/device success without evidence.
